## Verification

<!-- List the exact checks and Home Assistant smokes performed. -->

- [ ] `uv run pytest -q`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .`

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, pet names, serials, locations, fences, or unredacted private data included
